issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing filter conditions for {Cross Guild} type OR 'Baroque Works' type (excluding Mr.3). Missing the 'look at 4 cards' mechanic and the 'place rest at bottom in any order' mechanic.
Filter is set to 'Any' but should specify: CardType includes 'Cross Guild' OR CardType includes 'Baroque Works' AND CardName is not 'Mr.3(Galdino)'. Maximum 1 card can be selected.
Missing action to handle remaining 3 cards: they must be placed at bottom of deck in any order. This requires a secondary action or extended mechanic not captured.
